focus: [D2-10/D2] register (brand vs product) not pinnable at command entry though it gates density/motion/color/copy (corpus: impeccable-main)

label: Can /design:* commands pin and prove Brand vs Product register before mode execution?

label: Register gates downstream command behavior across density, motion, color, copy and audit severity
